briefdescription.para: Convert channel ID to array index.

detaileddescription.para: This macro converts a channel ID to the corresponding array index by subtracting the base channel ID.

parameterdescription.para: Channel ID to convert.

simplesect.para: Array index corresponding to the channel ID.

briefdescription.para: Check if channel ID is a regular channel.

detaileddescription.para: This macro checks if the given channel ID represents a regular channel (channel A or channels 1-4).

parameterdescription.para: Channel ID to check.

simplesect.para: Non-zero if the ID is a regular channel, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Check if channel ID is a common channel.

detaileddescription.para: This macro checks if the given channel ID represents a common channel (common channel A or common channels 0-1).

parameterdescription.para: Channel ID to check.

simplesect.para: Non-zero if the ID is a common channel, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Check if channel ID is the TX MMCM channel.

detaileddescription.para: This macro checks if the given channel ID represents the transmit MMCM channel.

parameterdescription.para: Channel ID to check.

simplesect.para: Non-zero if the ID is the TX MMCM channel, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Check if channel ID is the RX MMCM channel.

detaileddescription.para: This macro checks if the given channel ID represents the receive MMCM channel.

parameterdescription.para: Channel ID to check.

simplesect.para: Non-zero if the ID is the RX MMCM channel, 0 otherwise.

memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_IsTxUsingQpll
memberdef.initializer: ((XHDMIPHY1_PLL_TYPE_QPLL == \ XHdmiphy1_GetPllType(InstancePtr, QuadId, XHDMIPHY1_DIR_TX, ChId)) || \ (XHDMIPHY1_PLL_TYPE_QPLL0 == \ XHdmiphy1_GetPllType(InstancePtr, QuadId, XHDMIPHY1_DIR_TX, ChId)) || \ (XHDMIPHY1_PLL_TYPE_QPLL1 == \ XHdmiphy1_GetPllType(InstancePtr, QuadId, XHDMIPHY1_DIR_TX, ChId)))

briefdescription.para: Check if TX is using QPLL.

detaileddescription.para: This macro checks if the transmit channel is using any QPLL type (QPLL, QPLL0, or QPLL1) for the specified channel.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the HDMI PHY instance.
Quad ID.
Channel ID.

simplesect.para: Non-zero if TX is using QPLL, 0 otherwise.

memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_IsRxUsingQpll
memberdef.initializer: ((XHDMIPHY1_PLL_TYPE_QPLL == \ XHdmiphy1_GetPllType(InstancePtr, QuadId, XHDMIPHY1_DIR_RX, ChId)) || \ (XHDMIPHY1_PLL_TYPE_QPLL0 == \ XHdmiphy1_GetPllType(InstancePtr, QuadId, XHDMIPHY1_DIR_RX, ChId)) || \ (XHDMIPHY1_PLL_TYPE_QPLL1 == \ XHdmiphy1_GetPllType(InstancePtr, QuadId, XHDMIPHY1_DIR_RX, ChId)))

briefdescription.para: Check if RX is using QPLL.

detaileddescription.para: This macro checks if the receive channel is using any QPLL type (QPLL, QPLL0, or QPLL1) for the specified channel.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the HDMI PHY instance.
Quad ID.
Channel ID.

simplesect.para: Non-zero if RX is using QPLL, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Check if TX is using CPLL.

detaileddescription.para: This macro checks if the transmit channel is using CPLL for the specified channel.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the HDMI PHY instance.
Quad ID.
Channel ID.

simplesect.para: Non-zero if TX is using CPLL, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Check if RX is using CPLL.

detaileddescription.para: This macro checks if the receive channel is using CPLL for the specified channel.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the HDMI PHY instance.
Quad ID.
Channel ID.

simplesect.para: Non-zero if RX is using CPLL, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: This typedef enumerates the various protocols handled by the Video PHY controller (HDMIPHY).
This typedef enumerates the list of available interrupt handler types.

detaileddescription.para: The values are used as parameters to the XHdmiphy1_SetIntrHandler function.

briefdescription.para: This typedef enumerates the list of available hdmi handler types.

detaileddescription.para: The values are used as parameters to the XHdmiphy1_SetHdmiCallback function.

briefdescription.para: This typedef enumerates the different PLL types for a given GT channel.
This typedef enumerates the available channels.
This typedef enumerates the available reference clocks for the PLL clock selection multiplexer.
This typedef enumerates the available reference clocks used to drive the RX/TX datapaths.
This typedef enumerates the available reference clocks used to drive the RX/TX output clocks.
This typedef enumerates the available clocks that are used as multiplexer input selections for the RX/TX output clock.
Enumeration of possible states a transceiver can be in.

detaileddescription.para: This enumeration defines the various operational states that a GT transceiver can be in during its operation.

briefdescription.para: Log event TX GPO Rising Edge.
Log event RX GPO Rising Edge.
Log evt Vid not supported no DRU.
Log event QPLL Config not found.
Log evt LCPLL Config not found.
Log evt RPLL Config not found.
Log event QPLL Config not found.
Log evt Vid fmt not supported.
Log event MMCM Config not found.
Log event DRU clk wrong freq.
Enumeration of log events for the HDMI PHY driver.

detaileddescription.para: This enumeration defines the various log events that can be recorded by the HDMI PHY driver for debugging and monitoring purposes.

briefdescription.para: Enumeration of linerate to TMDS clock ratio for HDMI TX pattern generator.

detaileddescription.para: This enumeration defines the various line rate to TMDS clock ratios that can be used for the HDMI TX TMDS clock pattern generator.

briefdescription.para: This typedef enumerates the available PRBS patterns available from the.
Callback type which represents the handler for interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 instance.

briefdescription.para: Callback type which represents a custom timer wait handler.

detaileddescription.para: This is only used for Microblaze since it doesn't have a native sleep function. To avoid dependency on a hardware timer, the default wait functionality is implemented using loop iterations; this isn't too accurate. If a custom timer handler is used, the user may implement their own wait implementation using a hardware timer (see example/) for better accuracy.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 instance.
is the number of microseconds to be passed to the timer function.
is a pointer to the callback reference.
is a pointer to the callback reference.
is a pointer to the callback reference.

briefdescription.para: This function retrieves the configuration for this Video PHY instance and fills in the InstancePtr->Config structure.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 instance.
is a pointer to the configuration structure that will be used to copy the settings from.
is the device base address in the virtual memory space. If the address translation is not used, then the physical address is passed.

simplesect.para: Unexpected errors may occur if the address mapping is changed after this function is invoked.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId, XHdmiphy1_PllRefClkSelType QpllRefClkSel, XHdmiphy1_PllRefClkSelType CpllxRefClkSel, XHdmiphy1_PllType TxPllSelect, XHdmiphy1_PllType RxPllSelect)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_PllInitialize

briefdescription.para: This function will initialize the PLL selection for a given channel.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID to operate on.
is the QPLL reference clock selection for the quad.
is the CPLL reference clock selection for the quad.
is the reference clock selection for the quad's TX PLL dividers.
is the reference clock selection for the quad's RX PLL dividers.

briefdescription.para: This function will obtian the IP version.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.

simplesect.para: The IP version of the Video PHY core.

briefdescription.para: This function is the delay/sleep function for the XHdmiphy1 driver.

detaileddescription.para: For the Zynq family, there exists native sleep functionality. For MicroBlaze however, there does not exist such functionality. In the MicroBlaze case, the default method for delaying is to use a predetermined amount of loop iterations. This method is prone to inaccuracy and dependent on system configuration; for greater accuracy, the user may supply their own delay/sleep handler, pointed to by InstancePtr->UserTimerWaitUs, which may have better accuracy if a hardware timer is used.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 instance.
is the number of microseconds to delay/sleep for.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId, u64 LineRateHz)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_CfgLineRate

detaileddescription.para: This is a software only configuration and this value is used in the PLL calculator.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID to operate on.
is the line rate to configure software.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the reference clock type is valid.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_DirectionType Dir, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_GetPllType

briefdescription.para: Obtain the channel's PLL reference clock selection.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
is the channel ID which to operate on.

simplesect.para: The PLL type being used by the channel.

briefdescription.para: This function will return the line rate in Hz for a given channel / quad.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to check.
is the channel ID for which to retrieve the line rate.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId, XHdmiphy1_DirectionType Dir, u8 Hold)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_ResetGtPll

briefdescription.para: This function will reset the GT's PLL logic.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID which to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
is an indicator whether to "hold" the reset if set to 1. If set to 0: reset, then enable.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId, XHdmiphy1_DirectionType Dir, u8 Hold)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_ResetGtTxRx

briefdescription.para: This function will reset the GT's TX/RX logic.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID which to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
is an indicator whether to "hold" the reset if set to 1. If set to 0: reset, then enable.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId, XHdmiphy1_DirectionType Dir, u8 Polarity)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_SetPolarity

briefdescription.para: This function will set/clear the TX/RX polarity bit.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID which to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
0-Not inverted 1-Inverted

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId, XHdmiphy1_DirectionType Dir, XHdmiphy1_PrbsPattern Pattern)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_SetPrbsSel

briefdescription.para: This function will set the TX/RXPRBSEL of the GT.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID which to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
is the pattern XHdmiphy1_PrbsPattern

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId, u8 ForceErr)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_TxPrbsForceError

briefdescription.para: This function will force an error in the TX PRBS pattern for the GT.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID which to operate on.
0-No Error 1-Force Error

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId, u8 Vs)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_SetTxVoltageSwing

briefdescription.para: This function will set the TX voltage swing value for a given channel.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID to operate on.
is the voltage swing value to write.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId, u8 Pe)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_SetTxPreEmphasis

briefdescription.para: This function will set the TX pre-emphasis value for a given channel.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID to operate on.
is the pre-emphasis value to write.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId, u8 Pc)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_SetTxPostCursor

briefdescription.para: This function will set the TX post-cursor value for a given channel.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID to operate on.
is the post-cursor value to write.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId, XHdmiphy1_DirectionType Dir, u8 Enable)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_SetRxLpm

briefdescription.para: This function will enable or disable the LPM logic in the Video PHY core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
will enable (if 1) or disable (if 0) the LPM logic.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId, u16 Addr, u16 Val)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_DrpWr

briefdescription.para: This function will initiate a write DRP transaction.

detaileddescription.para: It is a wrapper around XHdmiphy1_DrpAccess.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID on which to direct the DRP access.
is the DRP address to issue the DRP access to.
is the value to write to the DRP address.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the DRP access was successful.
XST_FAILURE otherwise, if the busy bit did not go low, or if the ready bit did not go high.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId, u16 Addr, u16 *RetVal)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_DrpRd

briefdescription.para: This function will initiate a read DRP transaction.

detaileddescription.para: It is a wrapper around XHdmiphy1_DrpAccess.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID on which to direct the DRP access.
is the DRP address to issue the DRP access to.
is the DRP read_value returned implicitly.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the DRP access was successful.
XST_FAILURE otherwise, if the busy bit did not go low, or if the ready bit did not go high.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_DirectionType Dir, u8 Hold)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_MmcmPowerDown

briefdescription.para: This function will power down the mixed-mode clock manager (MMCM) core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
is an indicator whether to "hold" the power down if set to 1. If set to 0: power down, then power back up.

briefdescription.para: This function will start the mixed-mode clock manager (MMCM) core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_DirectionType Dir, u8 Enable)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_IBufDsEnable

briefdescription.para: This function enables the TX or RX IBUFDS peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
specifies TRUE/FALSE value to either enable or disable the IBUFDS, respectively.

briefdescription.para: This function enables the TX or RX CLKOUT1 OBUFTDS peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
specifies TRUE/FALSE value to either enable or disable the OBUFTDS, respectively.

briefdescription.para: This function installs a callback function for the HDMIPHY error conditions.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 instance.
CallbackFunc
is the address to the callback function.
CallbackRef
is the user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.
None.
The XHdmiphy1_ErrorHandler API calls the registered function in ErrorCallback and passes two arguments: 1) CallbackRef 2) Error Type as defined by XHdmiphy1_ErrType. Sample Function Call: CallbackFunc(CallbackRef, XHdmiphy1_ErrType);

briefdescription.para: This function installs an asynchronous callback function for the LogWrite API:

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 instance.
is the address of the callback function.
is a user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

briefdescription.para: This function will print the entire log.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function will reset the driver's logging mechanism.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function will read the last event from the log.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function will insert an event in the driver's logging mechanism.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the event type to log.
is the associated data for the event.

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for the XHdmiphy1 driver.

detaileddescription.para: It will detect what kind of interrupt has happened, and will invoke the appropriate callback function.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 instance.

briefdescription.para: This function runs a self-test on the XHdmiphy1 driver/device.

detaileddescription.para: The sanity test checks whether or not all tested registers hold their default reset values.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 instance.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the self-test passed - all tested registers hold their default reset values.

briefdescription.para: This function looks for the device configuration based on the unique device ID.

detaileddescription.para: The table XHdmiphy1_ConfigTable[] contains the configuration information for each device in the system.

parameterdescription.para: is the unique device ID of the device being looked up.

simplesect.para: A pointer to the configuration table entry corresponding to the given device ID, or NULL if no match is found.
None. This function looks for the device configuration based on the base address. The table XHdmiphy1_ConfigTable[] contains the configuration information for each device in the system.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device being looked up.

simplesect.para: A pointer to the configuration table entry corresponding to the given base address, or NULL if no match is found.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the Video PHY for HDMI.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 instance.
is a pointer to the configuration structure that will be used to copy the settings from.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId, XVidC_PixelsPerClock Ppc, XVidC_ColorDepth Bpc, XVidC_ColorFormat ColorFormat)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_SetHdmiTxParam

briefdescription.para: This function update/set the HDMI TX parameter.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdmiphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID to operate on.
is the pixels per clock to set.
is the bits per color to set.
is the color format to set.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if low resolution video not supported.

briefdescription.para: This function update/set the HDMI RX parameter.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdmiphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID to operate on.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if low resolution video not supported.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId, XHdmiphy1_DirectionType Dir, XVidC_PixelsPerClock Ppc, XVidC_ColorDepth Bpc)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_HdmiCfgCalcMmcmParam

briefdescription.para: This function calculates the HDMI MMCM parameters.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdmiphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID to operate on.
is an indicator for RX or TX.

specifies the total number of pixels per clock.
1 = XVIDC_PPC_1
2 = XVIDC_PPC_2
4 = XVIDC_PPC_4

specifies the color depth/bits per color component.
6 = XVIDC_BPC_6
8 = XVIDC_BPC_8
10 = XVIDC_BPC_10
12 = XVIDC_BPC_12
16 = XVIDC_BPC_16

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if calculated PLL parameters updated successfully.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_SysClkDataSelType TxSysPllClkSel, XHdmiphy1_SysClkDataSelType RxSysPllClkSel)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_HdmiUpdateClockSelection

briefdescription.para: This function Updates the HDMIPHY clocking.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the SYSCLKDATA selection for TX.
is the SYSCLKDATA selection for RX.

briefdescription.para: This function resets clock detector TX/RX frequency.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is an indicator for RX or TX.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the frequency of the RX/TX reference clock as measured by the clock detector peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is an indicator for RX or TX.

simplesect.para: The measured frequency of the RX/TX reference clock.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the raw (unconditional) frequency of the RX/TX reference clock as measured by the clock detector peripheral.

detaileddescription.para: Unlike XHdmiphy1_ClkDetGetRefClkFreqHz, this function always returns the measured value regardless of lock status - useful for debugging.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is an indicator for RX or TX.

simplesect.para: The raw measured frequency of the RX/TX reference clock.
This function returns the actual measured frequency value even when lock conditions are not met. Use this for debugging to determine if a clock is present vs not locked.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the frequency of the DRU reference clock as measured by the clock detector peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.

simplesect.para: The measured frequency of the DRU reference clock.
The design must have a DRU for this function to return a valid value.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the raw (unconditional) frequency of the DRU reference clock as measured by the clock detector peripheral.

detaileddescription.para: Unlike XHdmiphy1_DruGetRefClkFreqHz, this function always returns the measured value without any range checking - useful for debugging.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.

simplesect.para: The raw measured frequency of the DRU reference clock.
This function returns the actual measured frequency value without range validation. Use this for debugging to see the raw DRU clock measurement independent of expected frequency ranges.

briefdescription.para: This function prints Video PHY debug information related to HDMI.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdmiphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID to operate on.

briefdescription.para: This function installs an HDMI callback function for the specified handler type.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 instance.
is the interrupt handler type which specifies which interrupt event to attach the callback for.
is the address to the callback function.
is the user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

briefdescription.para: This function will configure the HDMIPHY to HDMI 2.0 mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdmiphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is an indicator for RX or TX.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if low resolution video not supported.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_DirectionType Dir, u64 LineRate, u8 NChannels)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_Hdmi21Config

briefdescription.para: This function will configure the GT for HDMI 2.1 operation.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdmiphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is an indicator for RX or TX.
is the line rate for HDMI 2.1 operation.
is the number of channels for HDMI 2.1 operation.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if low resolution video not supported.

briefdescription.para: This function prints out Video PHY register and GT Channel and Common DRP register contents.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdmiphy core instance.
